content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market weak with Nifty -1.04%, IT crashing -4.65%, and VIX +3.5% to 19.24 indicating rising fear. Book is already 68% deployed with net negative unrealized P&L today. Deployment hysteresis applies — default disposition is NO new entries, focus on managing existing book.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23890,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "MAHABANK down 6.2% but SL at 75.00 is intact (CMP 76.48). Q4 results were strong (+35% PAT, GNPA improved). Stock rallied into results then profit-booked. PSU bank index still +15% MTD. SL is just 1.9% below CMP — leave as is; if it hits, thesis was wrong on timing. Will not loosen SL. Do not add."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1007.15,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position up +4.5%. Current SL at 1007.15 is already above entry (984) — breakeven+ locked in. No-op MODIFY per rules — switching to HOLD.",
      "_note": "Converting to HOLD — SL already trailed above breakeven."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Gold ETF -1.2%. Hedge position in risk-off environment. VIX rising, geopolitical tensions intact. FOMC Apr 29 key catalyst. SL at 119 is ~3.8% below CMP — appropriate for ETF. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1412.94,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position barely green (+0.2%), near 52w high. Outstanding Q4 results (27% PAT growth, 26.3% EBITDA margin - best in FMCG). Tightening SL from 1405 to 1412.94 (breakeven) to protect capital while giving room to run. Target 1500 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.6%. Audited Q4 results Apr 27 — binary event risk 3 days away. CASA ratio slipped. Current SL 1035 is 1.3% below CMP — tight and appropriate. Hold into results, don't add."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.2%. Q4 results Apr 29 — binary event in 5 days. Stock at/above 52w high and at top of analyst target band Rs 587-687. Not adding. SL at 675 is ~1.3% below CMP, tight and appropriate. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Position -2.7%. Q4 results Apr 30 — binary event. Defensive FMCG, sector bid on Nestle read-through. SL at 2260 is ~1.9% below CMP, appropriate. Position is small (~5% of portfolio). Do not add or trim; hold into results."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.8%. Q4 on May 15. Utility defensive. SL at 393 is 2% below CMP. Hold — thesis intact, no position management action needed."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at 75 is 1.9% below CMP; let it play out. Cannot loosen; tightening further is premature with position already -6%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1007.15 (above 984 entry) — breakeven+ locked. Position +4.5%. Per rule, trail to max(entry, last-2%) = max(984, 1008.47) = 1008.47. Current SL 1007.15 is within 0.1% — no meaningful move warranted."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Hedge position, slight negative. Keep wide SL for ETF hedge to avoid noise exit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1412.94,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 1405 to breakeven 1412.94 — near 52w high, Q4 blockbuster, defensive in weak tape. Small tighten to remove downside."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results Apr 27 binary. SL already tight at 1035 (1.3% below). Do not change into event."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 Apr 29 binary event. SL at 675 is tight. At 52w high, at top of analyst range. Hold into print."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 Apr 30. Position small, SL defined. Let it play out into the print."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Minor negative. SL appropriate. No action."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "HSCL, EMCURE, ONESOURCE, HUDCO, ABSLAMC, PPLPHARMA, OFSS, CLEAN — noted for relative strength but NOT adding in a weak tape with book already 68% deployed and session net negative. SBIN shows relative strength but at 52w high with EGM May 15 — watch for pullback. DIVISLAB, HDFCBANK, ONGC, COALINDIA — no actionable setup today. Will revisit when either (a) market breadth improves, (b) one of my Apr 27-30 event names completes its binary and frees capital, or (c) a clear pullback entry emerges.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 68% deployed, session P&L -0.15%, VIX +3.5%, Nifty -1%, IT -4.65%. Deployment hysteresis rule applies — default to NO new entries. Four of eight holdings have binary event risk in the next 6 trading days (AUBANK Apr 27, GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30, SBIN/NTPC May 15). Concentrated event exposure is real. Key action this cycle: trailed NESTLEIND SL to breakeven. PNBHOUSING already locked above breakeven. MAHABANK is the only meaningful loser; SL at 75 will enforce discipline. Cluster check: PNBHOUSING + AUBANK + MAHABANK = ~28% combined weight in rate-sensitive financials — at/near cluster limit, no more financial adds. Capital preservation mode; waiting for either a pullback or event resolution to redeploy."
}
